interventionFallback.immediateAction: Gather more evidence before a plan
interventionFallback.shortPractice: 3–7 items on the same topic at a slightly lower difficulty
interventionFallback.avoid: Do not jump too high in level or mix several topics together.
failureSignals: No change after two structured cycles
interventionFallback.hypothesisChange: Failure on the proposed check, or success only with heavy hinting

interventionWithTaxonomy.avoid: Do not jump too high in level, mix several topics, or rely on general feedback without an example.
improvementSignals: Transfer success to a similar task
interventionWithTaxonomy.hypothesisChange: When the recommended probe fails or strong counter-evidence appears

probeFallback.objective: Separate a foundation gap from a topic-specific issue
probeFallback.specification: A parallel task on the same principle with reduced complexity
probeFallback.stoppingRule: Two consistent sequences or stable improvement

probeWithTaxonomy.objective: Distinguish a foundation difficulty from a topic-specific one
probeWithTaxonomy.stoppingRule: Meet the row recurrence threshold or reject the hypothesis
probeWithTaxonomy.hypothesisChange: When the recommended probe fails or strong counter-evidence appears
